pi_items.source: Code inspection of setup_task.sh which generates the file at this path.
Code inspection of base_data array inside setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetic spreadsheet generated directly by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/chicago_employees.xlsx. The generated dataset contains exactly 5 departments: POLICE, FIRE, STREETS & SAN, WATER MGMNT, and AVIATION.
